description: This schema represents an error returned from the API.

detail.description: A message describing a general error.

oneOf.description: A simple error with a field and a detail message.

field.description: The field that the error is associated with.

detail.description: A specific message describing the error.

field.description: If the error isn’t field-specific, the non_field_errors key will be used for issues spanning multiple fields or related to the overall data object.

detail.description: A specific message describing the error related to fields or the overall data object.

oneOf.description: A nested error object that contains an array of errors. Supports multiple levels of nesting for complex structures like arrays and nested objects.

field.description: The field that the error is associated with.

errors.description: An array of nested errors. Each error can be either a simple error with field and detail, or another nested error with field and errors.

oneOf.description: A simple nested error with a field and detail.

field.description: The field that the nested error is associated with.

detail.description: A specific message describing the nested error.

oneOf.description: A deeply nested error that contains another level of errors. Applicable for invalid root fields with array of objects.

detail.description: A specific message describing the deeply nested error.
